description_long: This is a tall, ornate bookcase featuring a decorative wrought iron frame with intricate scrollwork at the top and sides. The structure is composed of four wooden shelves, each supported by the metal frame, providing ample space for storage or display. The ironwork is painted black, contrasting with the warm, medium-brown wood of the shelves. The open-back design allows visibility through the bookcase, making it suitable for placement against a wall or as a room divider. The feet are slender and slightly raised, contributing to an elegant, airy appearance. The overall style blends traditional and rustic elements, making it a striking piece for urban interiors or outdoor patios.
description: A tall, decorative bookcase with a black wrought iron frame and four wooden shelves, featuring ornate scrollwork and a rustic-traditional style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, ornate scrollwork, and all four wooden shelves.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the elaborate iron scrollwork along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the open-back design and shelf arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the shelf depth and side scrollwork details.
